calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-16-2012 Advanced From Oct-03-12 To Aug-29-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ridwana Bentley in Propria Persona.

The Court denied the Petition for Order Confirming Successor Trustee and Trust Asset stating that the property was not listed on schedule A, that the Trust refers to 50% of the property but that there is not enough here to confirm the property in the Trust. The Court informed Ms. Bentley that the matter will have to be probated. Ms. Bentley stated that there is no final divorce and that there was an interspousal deed which transferred 100% of the property to Ronald.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Continued To Sep-04-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

For Order Shortening Time
Off Calendar Aug-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
